name: Acquisition Debt Interest Optimization

eligibility.description: Corporations engaging in M&A activity can structure debt to avoid subordination or convertibility features to bypass the $5M interest deduction cap.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Corporations can deduct up to $5 million in interest on debt used to acquire another corporation's stock or assets, provided the debt does not meet all four criteria of 'corporate acquisition indebtedness' (subordination, convertibility, high debt-to-equity, and low earnings coverage).
